mapper.insert: insert into chat_message (id, session_id, role, content, sources, citations_json, sort_order, create_time) values (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sources}, #{citationsJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
